metadata.framework_name: ASTO (Astrological System & Trading Operations) Complete System
metadata.description: The absolute final, unified synthesis of all ASTO modules, integrating the Fate-Engine, Financial OS Crown Architecture, RSI Engine, and Real-Time Infrastructure into a single, self-evolving complete system.

fate_engine.purpose: Production-grade specification for chart calculation, interpretation, and narrative synthesis.

layers.Perception: The Eye - Data ingestion and symbolic correspondence.
layers.Cognition: The Mind - Analysis, probability calculation, and strategy formulation.
layers.Execution: The Hand - Trade execution and order management.
layers.Reflection: The Memory - Post-trade analysis and recursive learning.

financial_os_crown.symbolic_grammar: Ten foundational design principles governing the system's logic.

financial_trading_engine_v7.probability_formula: P_MASTER = Base(0.5) * AFE(1.0-12.0) * KCIL(0.6-1.6) * Chart_Type(1.0-1.4) * Chaldean(0.5-1.8) * Uranian(0.7-1.5) * Harmonic(0.8-1.3) * Progressions(0.9-1.4) * Boolean_Gates * Technical_Veto(0.0-1.0)

relationship_os_master.sexual_archetypes: Full Robson sexuality framework integrated with sign-pair dynamics.

alpha_evolve_discovery.llm_guidance: Semantic evolution with domain knowledge embedding and bloat control.

advanced_stats.tail_risk: High-precision tail dependence modeling and risk flagging.

real_time_streaming.binance_websocket: Real-time price feed with automatic V5.0 enrichment.
real_time_streaming.live_dashboard: Production-ready Shiny dashboard with live signals and risk alerts.

validation_pipeline.unit_tests: Comprehensive suite for data integrity and signal accuracy.

astrological_compendium.celestial_bodies: 50+ Fixed Stars, 40+ Asteroids, 12 Planets, 15 Dwarf Planets.
astrological_compendium.lunar_mansions: 28 Mansions for electional and magical timing.
